text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Wow. It's more packed here than at my fashion
shows.
choice_data_list: Everyone is here to see you run.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Then I can't be looking tacky out there. I'll have
to spruce up my form.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: I'm going to give it my all on this runway!
